reviews.review_description: this game was old gorilla tag but it keeped updating but then the developable made another game that doesn't have any updates and it's old i think this game is gonna be separate from the other game but they made a game with no updates i think they're not gonna update the game i'm talking about the game that's not this one i think the other game they made what is the old one that they're not gonna update i think this one is gonna update i think he's doing this because he wants to relive all of the other updates but then people like me got mad so he made a game that's old again hopefully they won't update the other one so things are going good so far sorry about what i said before i just had to give you time i'm talking to you to develop
